features: „ÄêCooling Steels Bristles„ÄëThe bristles are made of special steel, and ultra-smooth rounded tips effectively massage the scalp acupuncture points, Experience a deep, cooling scalp massage. At the same time, it will stimulate blood flow which results in healthy hair.

„ÄêErgonomically & Save Space„ÄëOur hair brush's ergonomic Curve design Handle makes it more comfortable to use. hair brush's lanyard design, lets you easily hang it, convenient for storage and saving space.
„ÄêECO-FRIENDLY„Äë100% natural bamboo paddle uses no endangered wood that great eco-friendly and sustainable alternative to plastic combs, and can be composted at the end of its life.
„ÄêGENTLE ON ALL HAIR TYPES„ÄëSuitable for sensitive scalp, not tugging on hair while removing the tangles, is ideal for ALL hair types and also works great on both wet & dry hair.

„ÄêCREATIVE GIFT„Äë The perfect gift for all ages to provide your friend and family with the perfect daily hair care experience, and an ideal comb for the on-the-go, stay in good shape anytime, anywhere.
description: Product Description Bamboo Hair Brush with Metal Bristles The firm bristles of a steel brush can help exfoliate the scalp, removing dead skin cells, and product buildup, and provides effective scalp stimulation, promoting blood circulation. This can contribute to a cleaner and healthier scalp environment, reducing dandruff and itchiness. Steel bristle brushes are excellent for detangling hair, especially if you have thick or coarse hair. The bristles can easily glide through knots and tangles, minimizing breakage and reducing the risk of hair damage. Lanyard Design The Lanyard at the end of the handle can be hung on the bathroom hook or anywhere there's a hook, for easy access and space-saving. Reinforcement Device Wire brush bristle bottom reinforcement minimizes bristles from sinking into the rubber mat while reducing the risk of damage. Ergonomic Handle The bamboo ergonomic handle makes it easier for you to hold and control the hairbrush, and enjoy brushing your hair every time with ease. Perfact For Daily Use The Steel bristle brushes are suitable for various hair types, including straight, wavy, and curly hair. Steel bristles can help minimize static electricity in the hair, reducing frizz and flyaways. This is especially beneficial for those with fine or thin hair prone to static. and typically more durable and long-lasting compared to plastic bristles. They can withstand regular use and are less likely to break or wear out quickly.
